mapper.select: SELECT cs_cate_no AS csCateNo, parent_no AS parentNo, cate_name AS cateName, depth, sort_order AS sortOrder, use_yn AS useYn FROM cs_category WHERE use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY depth ASC, sort_order ASC, cs_cate_no ASC
SELECT cs_cate_no AS csCateNo, parent_no AS parentNo, cate_name AS cateName, depth, sort_order AS sortOrder, use_yn AS useYn FROM cs_category WHERE cs_cate_no = #{csCateNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cs_category(parent_no, cate_name, depth, sort_order, use_yn) VALUES(#{parentNo}, #{cateName}, COALESCE(#{depth}, 1), COALESCE(#{sortOrder}, 0), COALESCE(#{useYn}, 'Y'))
mapper.update: UPDATE cs_category SET parent_no = #{parentNo}, cate_name = #{cateName}, depth = #{depth}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, use_yn = #{useYn} WHERE cs_cate_no = #{csCateNo}
